item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US Downs Iranian Drones in Strait of Hormuz as Peace Deal Nears
item.description: The US military shot down multiple Iranian attack drones targeting commercial vessels near the Strait of Hormuz, even as both Washington and Tehran signaled that a comprehensive peace agreement is imminent.

item.title: 🇵🇰🇺🇸🇮🇷 Pakistan Confirms Final Text of US-Iran Peace Deal Reached
item.description: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced that a final, agreed-upon text for a peace deal between the United States and Iran has been reached, with both sides working on implementation steps.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇺🇸 China Arrests US Scholar on Suspicion of Spying
item.description: China confirmed the arrest of Min Zin, a US citizen who leads a think-tank focused on Myanmar, on suspicion of espionage and endangering Chinese national security.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇺🇦 EU Greenlights First Phase of Membership Talks for Ukraine and Moldova
item.description: Ambassadors from all 27 EU countries agreed to advance membership negotiations with Ukraine and Moldova, with the first phase of accession talks set to begin on Monday.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Death Toll Rises to 61 After Powerful Mindanao Earthquake
item.description: The death toll from the magnitude 7.8 earthquake that struck the southern Philippines has climbed to 61, with disaster agencies continuing rescue and recovery operations across Mindanao.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Putin Admits Russian Troops "Cannot Raise Their Heads" Under Ukrainian Drone Pressure
item.description: On Russia Day, Putin acknowledged that Russian forces struggle under relentless Ukrainian drone attacks, revealing how Ukraine has reshaped the battlefield four years into the war.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇫🇷 India and France to Deepen Undersea Defense Cooperation
item.description: New Delhi and Paris are expanding military ties, particularly in underwater combat capabilities, as both nations respond to growing security challenges in the Indo-Pacific region.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Over 500,000 Affected by Powerful M7.8 Earthquake in Philippines
item.description: A magnitude 7.8 earthquake struck off Mindanao, affecting more than half a million people, though no tsunami warning was issued. Cleanup efforts are underway.

item.title: 🌡️ Antarctica Records Winter Temperatures 20C Above Normal
item.description: Scientists are observing a "huge anomaly" as Antarctica experiences a prolonged heatwave with temperatures 20 degrees Celsius warmer than normal for winter, raising concerns about accelerating ice loss.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇮🇷 US-Iran peace deal close as military action flares near Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Both Washington and Tehran signaled an agreement to end their war is imminent, with a senior US official saying the text is agreed and an initial deal could be signed within days. Iranian drones continue targeting commercial vessels in the Strait.

item.title: 🇺🇦💰 Ukraine to request $20 billion from allies to maintain battlefield momentum
item.description: Ukraine is seeking additional military funding from allies to cement its battlefield advantage over Russia, as Kyiv looks to sustain gains in the four-year-old war.

item.title: 🇪🇺🇺🇦 EU advances membership talks with Ukraine and Moldova
item.description: EU ambassadors agreed to begin the first phase of membership negotiations with Ukraine and Moldova, a significant step toward potential EU expansion.

item.title: 🤖🏛️ AI executives from Anthropic, OpenAI, Google to attend G7 summit
item.description: Tech executives will join G7 leaders in France next week to discuss artificial intelligence governance, online safety, and economic challenges.

item.title: 🤖 Anthropic suspends new AI models after US security concerns
item.description: Anthropic has suspended its powerful new AI models Fable 5 and Mythos 5 after US authorities raised security concerns just days following their public release. The company said the government identified a method to jailbreak the systems.

item.title: 🇮🇳🇺🇸 G7 Summit Offers Trump and Modi Chance to Reset Ties After US Strikes Kill Indian Sailors
item.description: The upcoming G7 summit provides an opportunity for Trump and Modi to mend bilateral relations after US military strikes in Iran accidentally killed Indian sailors, with both leaders seeking to contain tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Ukraine Plans to Recruit Foreign Nationals for Up to Half of Frontline Assault Troops
item.description: Ukraine is preparing to open military recruitment to more foreign nationals, aiming for foreigners to fill 30-50% of assault and storm brigade positions amid severe manpower shortages.

item.title: 💀🇷🇺 More Than 200 18-Year-Old Russian Soldiers Killed in Ukraine War, New Data Shows
item.description: A new investigation identifies over 226,000 Russian war dead in Ukraine, including at least 200 18-year-old soldiers, highlighting the devastating human cost of the conflict on Russia's youngest conscripts.

item.title: 🛸🇷🇺 Inside Rubicon: The Structure of Russia's Elite Drone Center
item.description: Analysis of Russia's newly established Rubicon Center for drone warfare, one of the Russian military's most important developments in 2024-2025, reveals how Moscow is organizing its advanced drone capabilities.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah says Lebanon must be included in any US-Iran peace deal
item.description: A senior Hezbollah politician said the group is confident Iran will insist on Lebanon being part of any agreement with the United States, as hopes grow for a deal between Tehran and Washington.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE agrees to unlock billions of dollars for Iran, sources say
item.description: The United Arab Emirates has agreed to unlock between billion and billion for Iran, sources told Reuters, in a tactical shift after weeks of Iranian attacks on the Gulf state during the US-Israeli war with Iran.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines earthquake kills at least 55 on Mindanao island
item.description: A powerful earthquake struck Mindanao in the Philippines, killing at least 55 people and leaving a trail of destruction as the country picks up the pieces from its strongest quake in decades.

item.title: 📈 European shares rally as Middle East peace hopes push oil lower
item.description: European stocks surged more than 1% as renewed hopes for a diplomatic breakthrough in the Middle East dragged oil prices lower and injected fresh optimism into markets.

item.title: 🇻🇪🇺🇸⚔️ US strike kills Tren de Aragua leader with Venezuela cooperation
item.description: President Trump announced a "swift and lethal" US military strike killed Hector Rusthenford Guerrero Flores, leader of the Tren de Aragua gang, with Venezuelan assistance. The operation marks unprecedented cooperation between Washington and Caracas.

item.title: 🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 Iran ceasefire limbo leaves world between peace and war
item.description: Two months after a nominal cease-fire, Iran, Israel and the US remain in a dangerous stalemate with low-intensity clashes continuing. The New York Times examines the precarious state of negotiations and regional tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦💧 Ukrainian strike cuts water to Russian-held Donetsk
item.description: A Ukrainian military strike disrupted water supplies to parts of the Russian-occupied Donetsk region, including the regional capital, as infrastructure targeting continues on both sides of the war.
